# allowsMultipleSelection

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value indicating whether the user is allowed to select multiple identities.

## Declaration

```swift
var allowsMultipleSelection: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

The value of this property is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the user can select multiple records; otherwise, [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false]. The default value is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].

## Setting and Getting Properties

- **title**: The title of the identity picker.

items.description: The title of the identity picker.
items.name: title

title: allowsMultipleSelection
